nodes.name: 变构酶调控
nodes.subject: advanced-biology
nodes.definition: Allosteric regulation occurs when a regulatory ligand binds to a site distant from the active site, inducing a conformational change that alters substrate binding affinity and catalytic activity.

nodes.name: 氨基酸结构与性质
nodes.subject: advanced-biology
nodes.definition: Amino acids are organic molecules containing an amino group, a carboxyl group, a hydrogen atom, and a distinctive side chain bonded to a central alpha carbon.

edges.evidence: Both concepts are in biochemistry and relate to protein structure/function context.
